figures.caption: Table 1: Characteristics of the selected ground truth processes.
Fig. 1: Motivating Example: Models generated by gemini-3-flash for the Complaint Handling process (p13).

Fig. 2: Overview of the proposed resource-aware generation pipeline: from natural-language descriptions via a compact intermediate representation to BPMN collaboration models with automated layouting.

Fig. 3: Boxplot analysis of execution time (seconds) per iteration. The consistent distributions between the baseline (grey) and our approach (blue) demonstrate the efficiency of the extended generation pipeline.
Table 3: Average number of iterations required per model (Mean ± Std. Dev.). Lower values indicate higher generation stability.
Table 2: Control-flow quality scores (Mean ± SD): baseline vs. resource-aware. Paired t-test p-values show no significant difference (p > 0.05).
